# Invoice Generator
> Free online tool to create professional PDF invoices instantly.

## What it does
Generates professional PDF invoices entirely in the browser. Fill in a form with your business details, client info, and line items — see a live preview — then download a polished PDF. No account, no server, no data stored.

## Features
- Professional invoice form with sender, client, and line items
- Live preview that updates as you type
- Download as PDF (generated client-side with jsPDF)
- 3 invoice templates: Clean, Classic, Modern
- Company logo upload (processed locally)
- Multi-currency support (USD, EUR, GBP, INR, BRL, CAD, AUD)
- Auto-calculated subtotal, tax, discount, grand total
- Save/load draft invoices in browser storage
- 100% client-side — no data sent to any server

## Who it's for
- Freelancers billing clients
- Small business owners
- Contractors and consultants
- Anyone who needs a quick, professional invoice

## URL
https://freeinvoicegen.app

## How to use
Fill in your business details, client information, and line items. Choose a template, optionally upload your logo (PNG or JPG, 200x200px recommended), set currency and tax rate, then click Download PDF. Save drafts to continue later.

## Pricing
Completely free. No account needed. No limits.
